description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image. Define a before_script that changes directory to the website folder and runs npm install. Add a pages job (default stage) that executes npm run build, changes back to the repository root, creates a public directory, moves the contents of website/build/test-site into public, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the pages job to run only on the master branch.
